---
title: "NCOS Mesa Vegetation: Wrangling Brainstorm"
format: pdf
author: Lukas Lescano
date: "2026-05-11"
editor: source
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# 1. Set up

## Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false

# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

# file organization
library(here)

# data visualization
library(naniar)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
```

## Data

```{r}
#| label: data

veg <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "veg.csv"))

metadata <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "vp_veg_metadata.csv"))
```
